examples.title: SDG Priority Assessment Algorithm
examples.description: Algorithm for assessing and prioritizing SDGs based on country-specific needs
examples.code:
ALGORITHM SDG_Priority_Assessment
BEGIN
 INPUT: Country_Indicators[], Global_Benchmarks[]
 OUTPUT: Priority_SDG_List[]
 
 FOR each SDG in 1 to 17 DO
 Score[SDG] = 0
 FOR each Indicator in Country_Indicators DO
 Gap = Benchmark[SDG] - Actual[Indicator]
 IF Gap > Threshold THEN
 Score[SDG] = Score[SDG] + (Gap/100)
 END IF
 END FOR
 END FOR
 
 Priority_List = Sort(Score, DESCENDING)
 RETURN Priority_List[1..5]
END

// Example: Countries with high poverty gaps get SDG1 prioritized
examples.explanation: This algorithm helps countries identify which SDGs need immediate attention based on gap analysis between current indicators and global targets

examples.title: SDG Progress Tracking System
examples.description: Simple tracking system for monitoring SDG progress over time
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Track_SDG_Progress
BEGIN
 Initialize Progress_Table[17]
 FOR Year = 2015 TO 2030 DO
 FOR SDG = 1 TO 17 DO
 Current_Value = Get_Data(SDG, Year)
 Target_Value = Get_Target(SDG)
 Progress[SDG] = (Current_Value / Target_Value) * 100
 
 IF Progress[SDG] >= 100 THEN
 Status[SDG] = "ACHIEVED"
 ELSE IF Progress[SDG] >= 75 THEN
 Status[SDG] = "ON TRACK"
 ELSE IF Progress[SDG] >= 50 THEN
 Status[SDG] = "NEEDS ATTENTION"
 ELSE
 Status[SDG] = "CRITICAL"
 END IF
 END FOR
 Generate_Report(Year, Progress, Status)
 END FOR
END
examples.explanation: System to track progress of each SDG annually from baseline year 2015 to target year 2030 with status indicators
examples.timeComplexity: O(17 * 16) = O(1) constant for annual calculations

examples.title: Sustainable Project Selection
examples.description: Algorithm to select projects that contribute to multiple SDGs
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Select_Sustainable_Projects
BEGIN
 INPUT: Project_List[], SDG_Matrix[][]
 // SDG_Matrix[project][sdg] = 1 if contributes
 
 Max_Impact = 0
 Selected_Projects = []
 Budget = Get_Budget()
 
 FOR each Project in Project_List DO
 SDG_Count = Count(SDG_Matrix[Project], value=1)
 Cost_Effectiveness = SDG_Count / Project_Cost
 
 IF Cost_Effectiveness > Threshold AND Cost <= Budget THEN
 Add Project to Selected_Projects
 Budget = Budget - Project_Cost
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 Sort Selected_Projects by SDG_Count DESCENDING
 RETURN Selected_Projects
END

// Example: A solar project may contribute to SDG 7, SDG 13, and SDG 9
examples.explanation: Helps organizations select projects that maximize contribution to multiple SDGs within budget constraints
